pendingApplications.address: Bridge Works 2 Bridgewater Embankment Altrincham WA14 4RL
pendingApplications.proposal: Application under Section 19 of the Town and Country Planning (Listed Buildings and Conservation Areas Act 1990) for variation of condition 4 on planning permission 116886/VAR/25 (Application under Section 19 of the Town and Country Planning (Listed Buildings and Conservation Areas Act 1990) for variation of condition 4 on planning permission 115864/VAR/25 (Application under Section 19 of the Planning (Listed Building and Conservation Areas) Act 1990 for variation of conditions 3 and 4 on Listed Building Consent 111564/LBC/23 (Listed Building Consent for the conversion of Grade II listed former canal warehouse building to form 32 apartments including roof extension, partial demolition, repair and alteration). To amend the wording of conditions 3 and 4 to vary timescales (Condition 3 Submission of stabilisation information within nine months and Condition 4 Implementation and completion of stabilisation works within twelve months). To amend Condition 4 to vary the timescales for implementation of urgent works to within 18 months of the date of the original permission (29 August 2024).). To amend Condition 4 to vary the timescales for implementation of urgent works to within 25 months of the date of the original permission (29 August 2024).

Outline planning application (with all matters reserved except for access from Hulme Hall Road, Cornbrook Road, and Trafford Road) for a mixed-use development comprising residential uses; (Use Classes C2 up to 100 care beds; and C3 up to 2,600 units), purpose built student accommodation (Sui Generis Use Class up to 500 units), hotel accommodation (Use Class C1 up to 200 bedrooms), offices (Use Class E(g)(i) up to 70,000 m2), non-residential uses (Use Classes E(a), E(b), E(c), E(d), E(e), and E(f)) up to a combined maximum of 7,000 m2), and associated public open space, hard and soft landscaping works, internal access roads, infrastructure and ancillary works.
Outline planning application for the demolition of the existing building and erection of residential development of up to 69 dwellings with all matters reserved except for access, layout and scale

pendingApplications.address: Units 5 And 6 Mosley Road Trafford Park Manchester M17 1NB
pendingApplications.proposal: Demolition of existing buildings and erection of an industrial B2/B8 unit with ancillary office space, parking, service yard, access and associated infrastructure.
Residential development (use class C3) of 53 dwellings with associated amenity space, access, car and cycle parking, external landscaping, drainage and other associated works.

pendingApplications.proposal: Application under Section 73 of the Town and Country Planning Act 1990 (as amended) for variation of conditions 4, 5, 12 and 25 on planning permission 113251/FUL/24 (Full planning application for the erection of three residential buildings (Classes C2 and C3) totalling 66 units, provision of new parking and enhancements to existing parking, amendments to highways infrastructure (including linking east to west and north to south road layout), provision of community garden/allotments, landscaping and associated works.).
